query:
-- Step 1: Cull Finance, CRM Contact, Invoice via Email, Collections Contact, IT, Administration, Logistics, Development
UPDATE contacts 
SET enrichmentStatus = 'not_found',
    enrichedAt = NOW()
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND (email IS NULL OR email = '')
  AND title IN ('Finance', 'CRM Contact', 'Invoice via Email', 'Collections Contact', 'IT', 'Administration', 'Logistics', 'Development');

-- Step 2: Cull Service Operations and Service Purchase
UPDATE contacts 
SET enrichmentStatus = 'not_found',
    enrichedAt = NOW()
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND (email IS NULL OR email = '')
  AND title IN ('Service Operations', 'Service Purchase');

-- Step 3: Cull internal Sales & Marketing contacts
UPDATE contacts 
SET enrichmentStatus = 'not_found',
    enrichedAt = NOW()
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'manual'
  AND (email IS NULL OR email = '')
  AND title IN ('Sales & Marketing');
